title: Whipped Herbed Feta on Cucumber Rounds
description: Smooth, lemony whipped feta piped onto crisp cucumber rounds and finished with olive oil and cracked pepper. Easy to make ahead, great for entertaining.

ingredients.name: large English cucumber, sliced into 1/2-inch rounds
cracked black pepper or red pepper flakes (to finish)

instructions.text: In a food processor or with a hand mixer, blend feta, cream cheese (or Greek yogurt), olive oil, lemon juice, and garlic (if using) until smooth and creamy. Scrape down the sides as needed.
Fold in chopped chives by hand for color and freshness.
Slice cucumber into roughly 1/2-inch thick rounds — you'll get about 20–24. Arrange on a platter.
Spoon or pipe whipped feta onto each cucumber round. Drizzle with olive oil and top with cracked pepper or red pepper flakes. Serve immediately or refrigerate up to 30 minutes before serving.

notes:
Makes about 24 bites, sized for 8 adults as an appetizer.

Can be assembled up to 30 minutes ahead and refrigerated. The whipped feta itself keeps refrigerated for 2–3 days -- assemble the cucumber rounds close to serving so they stay crisp.

A piping bag or zip-lock with the corner snipped makes for a cleaner presentation than a spoon.
